## BaseIdModal.closeModal() method

Closes the modal.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
closeModal(payload: string): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  payload | string | The payload of the closing events: [XEventsTypes.UserClickedCloseModal](./x-components.xeventstypes.userclickedclosemodal.md) or [XEventsTypes.UserClickedOutOfModal](./x-components.xeventstypes.userclickedoutofmodal.md)<!-- -->. |
